title: Subnet Island Conquest
notice: Educational project inspired by EETEPA Vilhena Alves. It is not an official institutional system and does not use real student data.

missions.title: Claim The Base Island
missions.story: The school needs a base network for administration and lab services.
missions.challenge: Choose a CIDR block that supports 30 hosts without wasting too much space.
missions.hint: Count usable hosts, then choose the smallest safe block.
missions.deliverable: CIDR choice and usable host count.

missions.title: Build The VLAN Bridges
missions.story: Three islands need separation: students, teachers, and guests.
missions.challenge: Assign a VLAN and network range to each island without overlap.
missions.hint: Separate purpose first, then calculate ranges.

missions.title: Open The Safe Route
missions.story: A route is blocked because two islands have overlapping ranges.
missions.challenge: Find the overlap and propose a corrected subnet.
missions.hint: Compare network ID and final usable range boundaries.
